subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from the One imprisoned unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting, and who hath arrived in Iraq [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و ورد العراق و
